jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - FabAlley - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
